code: import React,{useState}from"react";import api from"../services/api";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function ExecutionPage(){const[workflowId,setWorkflowId]=useState("");const[inputData,setInputData]=useState("");const[result,setResult]=useState(null);const executeWorkflow=async()=>{try{const data=JSON.parse(inputData);const res=await api.post(`/workflows/${workflowId}/execute`,{data});setResult(res.data);}catch(err){alert("Invalid JSON");}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{padding:"20px"},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Execute Workflow"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"Workflow ID",value:workflowId,onChange:e=>setWorkflowId(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("textarea",{rows:"8",cols:"50",placeholder:"Execution Input JSON",value:inputData,onChange:e=>setInputData(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:executeWorkflow,children:"Run Workflow"}),result&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("pre",{children:JSON.stringify(result,null,2)})]});}export default ExecutionPage;
